heroEyebrow: Professional web experiences built for growth
heroTitle: Modern digital solutions for businesses that want to stand out.
heroDescription: Hi, I’m the developer behind SMUG CODES. I deliver clean, scalable, SEO-friendly web applications with a polished UX and fast performance.
aboutTitle: Turning ideas into polished, production-ready websites.
aboutDescription: I build websites and web applications that reflect your brand voice, streamline user journeys, and convert visitors into customers. My work blends front-end design, back-end architecture, and SEO optimization so every project is ready to launch.

aboutCards.title: Brand-aligned design
aboutCards.description: Interfaces that match your visual identity with professional typography, color, and layout.

aboutCards.title: Performance-first build
aboutCards.description: Lightweight code, fast delivery, and mobile-first responsiveness for every screen.

aboutCards.title: SEO & accessibility
aboutCards.description: Optimized metadata, semantic structure, and user-friendly interactions to help you get found.

servicesTitle: Services for startups, agencies, and growing businesses.

services.title: Web Applications
services.description: From admin dashboards to e-commerce platforms, I build secure full stack systems with PHP, JavaScript, and modern tooling.

services.title: Responsive Web Design
services.description: Beautiful, intuitive layouts that adapt to mobile, tablet, and desktop users.

services.title: SEO Optimization
services.description: Clean HTML, metadata, fast loading speeds, and accessible structure for better search visibility.

projectsTitle: Selected projects that showcase quality and polish.

projects.title: School Management Dashboard
projects.description: Robust admin tools, student records, and results management built with PHP and MySQL.

projects.title: Investment Platform
projects.description: Secure user flows, transaction tracking, and responsive layout for a financial web service.

projects.title: E-commerce Store
projects.description: Modern product catalog, checkout experience, and branding that supports online sales.

testimonialTitle: Designed to feel reliable, professional, and easy to use.
testimonialDescription: Every website I deliver is built to improve conversion, support brand trust, and delight visitors on every device.
testimonialQuote: SMUG CODES transformed our concept into a fast, user-friendly website. The process was smooth and the final product exceeded expectations.
contactTitle: Ready to build your next digital experience?
contactDescription: I’m available for freelance projects, long-term web development, and website refreshes. Let’s create something professional and easy to maintain.
feedbackTitle: Your thoughts help me refine every release.
feedbackDescription: Review the portfolio, then send a short note with what you liked and what you’d like to improve. Feedback helps me keep the site polished and user-friendly.
footerText: SMUG CODES © 2026 | Full Stack Web Developer portfolio. Built responsive, built professional.
